title: Pseudoxytenanthera dinhensis

Further classification places Pseudoxytenanthera dinhensis within the subfamily Bambusoideae, a subgroup of the Poaceae family. The tribe Olyreae is also a part of the classification, and the species is often found in tropical regions.
